objective: Implement and verify ctxindex V1 as the local personal-context gateway defined by `v1-context-access-layer`: typed definitions, trusted Extension loading, fresh generic storage, exact Realms, Gmail discovery/retrieval, threads, Artifacts/exports, reversible provider email Draft Actions, local-directory support, an external tenders proof, generated docs, and complete validation.

criteriaSnapshot.title: Public definitions and registries drive the runtime

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-1-gate.txt` (typecheck, lint, 181 passing tests, and compiled-extension regression passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Compiled ctxindex loads trusted external TypeScript Extensions

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-2-gate.txt` (explicit-path loading, atomic rejection, D3 relocation, Source preservation/recovery, typecheck, lint, and 190 tests passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Fresh generic storage enforces exact Realm and Source semantics

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-3-gate.txt` (fresh generic schema and prototype rejection, 51 focused storage tests, 198 passing full-suite tests with one skip, 10 integration tests, typecheck, lint, strict OpenSpec validation, and diff check passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Gmail discovery and retrieval use the generic contract

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-4-gate.txt` (mocked Gmail binary search/get/cache proof and the approved isolated read-only live Gmail search/get checkpoint passed)
evidence: `work/slice-5-gate.txt` (Relation/thread unit and binary-CLI out-of-order traversal, cross-Source joins, no provider I/O, typecheck, lint, full tests, and D3 passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Artifacts and exports are managed and observable

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-6-gate.txt` (Artifact CAS/download/cache/copy, exact retention purge and re-download, disk accounting, deterministic JSON/Profile EML export, 107 focused and 419 full-suite tests, typecheck, lint, strict OpenSpec, D3, and diff checks passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Gmail Draft Actions are typed, reversible, and cannot send

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-7-mocked-gate.txt` and `work/slice-7-live-draft.txt` (typed reversible Action contracts, zero-I/O invalid/no-send proofs, mocked binary create/update, and approved live stable-Ref Draft create/update with provider UI confirmation passed)

criteriaSnapshot.title: Local directories use the same generic Resource path
An external tenders Extension proves the public seam
User and agent interfaces derive from loaded registries
Complete V1 behavior is verified end to end
